# Launch Day Checklist

<!-- Generated by: Skill 34 (Launch Day Sequence) -->
<!-- Purpose: Step-by-step go-live procedure. Every item is actionable and verifiable. -->
<!-- Trigger: After all acceptance criteria pass and visual QA reports zero issues. -->
<!-- Rule: Do NOT launch until all P0 items are checked. P1 items within 24 hours. -->

## Pre-Launch Verification (P0 — Gate)

- [ ] All E2E tests passing on production URL
- [ ] Visual QA report shows zero critical issues
- [ ] Lighthouse scores >= 90 on all 4 categories
- [ ] axe-core accessibility audit: 0 violations
- [ ] All forms tested with 8-point matrix (empty, valid, invalid, XSS, SQLi, boundary, duplicate, timeout)
- [ ] Stripe webhook endpoint verified (if applicable)
- [ ] Auth flows tested: sign up, sign in, sign out, password reset
- [ ] Mobile responsive: verified at 375px and 390px
- [ ] No console errors on any page
- [ ] No exposed secrets in client bundle or git history

## DNS & Domain (P0)

- [ ] Domain DNS pointing to Cloudflare (nameservers or CNAME)
- [ ] SSL certificate active (Full Strict mode)
- [ ] www redirect configured (www -> apex or apex -> www)
- [ ] Custom domain added to Workers/Pages project
- [ ] HTTPS enforced (no mixed content)
- [ ] HSTS header enabled

## SEO Submission (P0)

- [ ] robots.txt allows crawling (remove any `Disallow: /` from dev)
- [ ] sitemap.xml valid and accessible at /sitemap.xml
- [ ] Submit sitemap to Google Search Console: `https://search.google.com/search-console`
- [ ] Submit sitemap to Bing Webmaster Tools: `https://www.bing.com/webmasters`
- [ ] Verify JSON-LD structured data: `https://search.google.com/test/rich-results`
- [ ] Verify OG tags: `https://www.opengraph.xyz/`
- [ ] Google Analytics (GA4) receiving events
- [ ] PostHog tracking page views

## Monitoring & Health (P0)

- [ ] Health endpoint live: `GET /health` returns 200
- [ ] Uptime monitoring configured (UptimeRobot or Better Stack)
- [ ] Alert email set for downtime notifications
- [ ] Sentry error tracking active and receiving test error
- [ ] Cloudflare Analytics dashboard accessible

## Cache & CDN (P1)

- [ ] Cloudflare cache rules configured (static assets: 1 year, HTML: 1 hour)
- [ ] Cache purge executed after final deploy
- [ ] Verify cache-control headers on static assets
- [ ] Verify no stale content served after purge
- [ ] Edge propagation confirmed (test from multiple regions if possible)

## Social & Announcement (P1)

- [ ] Social announcement drafted (X/Twitter, LinkedIn at minimum)
- [ ] Posted via Postiz (Skill 27) or manually
- [ ] GitHub repository description and URL updated
- [ ] GitHub social preview image (1280x640) uploaded
- [ ] Product Hunt listing prepared (if applicable)
- [ ] Launch email sent via Listmonk/Resend to subscriber list

## Legal & Compliance (P1)

- [ ] Privacy Policy page live at /privacy
- [ ] Terms of Service page live at /terms (if applicable)
- [ ] Cookie consent banner (if using cookies beyond essential)
- [ ] GDPR data deletion process documented (if serving EU users)
- [ ] Accessibility statement at /accessibility (optional but good)

## Backup & Recovery (P1)

- [ ] D1 database backup taken (baseline snapshot)
- [ ] R2 bucket contents documented
- [ ] KV namespace keys exported
- [ ] wrangler.toml committed to git
- [ ] Secrets list documented (names only, not values)
- [ ] Rollback procedure tested: `npx wrangler rollback`

## Post-Launch Verification (P1 — Within 1 Hour)

- [ ] Visit production URL in incognito browser
- [ ] Complete primary user flow end-to-end
- [ ] Check Sentry for any new errors
- [ ] Check PostHog for incoming events
- [ ] Check GA4 Realtime report for traffic
- [ ] Check Stripe dashboard for test mode cleanliness
- [ ] Verify email delivery (send test contact form)
- [ ] Check mobile experience on real device (not just emulator)

## Growth Setup (P2 — Within 24 Hours)

- [ ] Google Business Profile created (if local/service business)
- [ ] Schema markup verified in Google Rich Results Test
- [ ] Set up Google Search Console performance monitoring
- [ ] Configure PostHog funnels for primary conversion path
- [ ] Set up A/B test for hero CTA (if traffic warrants)
- [ ] Newsletter signup working and connected to Listmonk
- [ ] AI chat widget (Skill 43) trained on site content

## Documentation (P2)

- [ ] CLAUDE.md updated with "Current State" reflecting launch
- [ ] README.md reflects production reality
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md has v1.0.0 entry
- [ ] API documentation accurate (if public API)
- [ ] Internal architecture docs (repo-map) up to date

---
